title: DOG LICENSING & REDEMPTION - 211info
text: HOMEWARD BOUND PETS HUMANE SOCIETY SPAY/NEUTER CLINIC DOG LICENSING & REDEMPTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-person dog licensing and redemption services. 723 NE Evans Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Licensing Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 1:30pm-3:30pm Dog Redemptions: By appointment only Email (503) 583-2780 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Dog Redemptions (503) 583-2780 Dog Licensing (503) 472-0341 ext 4 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service. Call or visit website for more information. AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 1:30pm-3:30pm Services: Animal Control Animal Licenses Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - SPAY/NEUTER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
